title: rosmarinus officinalis var. serotinus
intro: Rosmarinus officinalis var. serotinus, also known as winter rosemary, is a variety of the evergreen shrub Rosmarinus officinalis, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosmarinus officinalis var. serotinus include improved cognitive function, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle and joint pain. Winter rosemary can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
